name: concordia
description: MVP web centralizado do protocolo Concordia para deliberacao assistida por IA.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @concordia/domain && npm run build -w @concordia/api && npm run build -w @concordia/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @concordia/domain && npm run typecheck -w @concordia/api && npm run typecheck -w @concordia/web
